zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL於1268年出生在法國阿奎泰藍德斯達可時，她的父親Guitard de Bourg29歲，母親Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres25歲。她於1283年5月14日與Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE結婚。她去世於1319年1月24日享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL于1268年出生在法国阿奎泰藍德斯達可时，她的父亲Guitard de Bourg29岁，母亲Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres25岁。她于1283年5月14日与Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE结婚。她去世于1319年1月24日享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BOURG
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Antoine, Cecile, Emile, Alcide, Anatole, Clovis, Ferrel, Leonce, Onile.

French: topographic name for someone who lived in a town as opposed to one who lived in a village, from Middle French bourg (Old French burc) ‘fortified town’, or a habitational name from (Le) Bourg, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Bourke , Bourque , Burk , and Burke .

History: Antoine Bourg/Bourque from Martaizé in Vienne, France, married Antoinette Landry in Acadia c. 1642. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Bourke, Bourque, and Burk(e).

variants.name: Bourgeois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Emile, Alphonse, Armand, Camille, Gaston, Monique, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Normand.

French: from bourgeois ‘burgher’ (from Old French burgeis, from burc ‘fortified town’), a status name for an inhabitant and (usually) freeman of a fortified town (see Bourg ). Compare Lebourgeois and also Boss , Burgess , and Bushway .
History: Jacques Bourgeois from France married Jeanne Trahan in Acadia c. 1643. Pierre Bourgeois from Poligny in Jura, France, married Marie-Louise Cléroux in Saint-Vincent-de-Paul, QC, in 1753.

variants.name: Bourke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Murphy.
Irish: variant of   Burke  .
Americanized form of French   Bourg   or of its altered form   Bourque  .

variants.name: Bourget
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Jacques, Lucien, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Germaine, Laurent, Ludger, Marcel, Marcell.
French: topographic name, a diminutive of   Bourg  , or a habitational name from (Le) Bourget, the name of several places in various parts of France.
Altered form of French Bourgeais, a variant of Bourgeois .

variants.name: Boulerice
meanings: Altered form of Breton Bourhis: from bourc'his ‘burgher’, a status name for an inhabitant and (usually) freeman of a fortified town (see Bourg , compare Bourgeois ).

variants.name: Bourque
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Andre, Aurele, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Henri, Jacques, Marcel, Normand.
French (mainly Doubs): variant of   Bourg   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourque are descendants of Antoine Bourg/Bourque from France (see Bourg ).

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: When Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL was born in 1268, in Dax, Landes, Aquitaine, France, her father, Guitard de Bourg, was 29 and her mother, Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres, was 25. She married Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE on 14 May 1283. She died on 24 January 1319, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL est née en 1268, à Dax, Landes, Aquitaine, France, son père, Guitard de Bourg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE le 14 mai 1283. Elle est décédée le 24 janvier 1319, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL 1268 in Dax, Landes, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guitard de Bourg 29 und ihre Mutter Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres 25. Sie hat am 14. Mai 1283 Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE geheiratet. Sie starb am 24. Januar 1319 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL è nata il nel 1268 nel Dax, Landes, Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Guitard de Bourg, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE il 14 maggio 1283. Morì il 24 gennaio 1319, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUILが1268年にフランスアクイティアインランズダックスで生まれた時，父Guitard de Bourgは29歳，母Thomasse Gombaut De Veyresは25歳であった。1283年5月14日にAyquem Guillaume de LESPARREと結婚した。彼女は1319年1月24日に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL(이)가 1268년 프랑스 아키테인 랜데스 다스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guitard de Bourg(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1283년 5월 14일 Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1319년 1월 24일 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL nasceu em 1268, em Dax, Landes, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guitard de Bourg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE em 14 de maio de 1283. Ela faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1319, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL родилась в 1268 г. в местности дакс, ландесь, аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Guitard de Bourg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE 14 мая 1283 г. Она умерла 24 января 1319 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rose DE BOURG DE VERTEUIL nació en 1268, en Dax, Landes, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guitard de Bourg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Thomasse Gombaut De Veyres, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ayquem Guillaume de LESPARRE el 14 de mayo de 1283. Murió el 24 de enero de 1319, a la edad de 51 años.
